description: §48.3.4 clean neg — a `fn build(x)` whose body is a deterministic function of its input (`x + 1`) SHALL NOT fire E-FN-004. Confirms the non-determinism walker does not false-fire on ordinary pure computation (only wall-clock / entropy / mutable-global reads trip it). `notCodes` asserts E-FN-004 stays silent.
rationale: §48.3.4 fires only on non-deterministic calls/reads (`Date.now`, `Math.random`, `window.*`, …). A `fn` that returns a deterministic value of its inputs is referentially transparent and silent.
